form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign eighth of 13 at Chantilly All Weather November 8 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Alma Mater carrying 58kg at $18. On debut fifth of 8 at Longchamp October 19 over 1800m, 6 len behind Maintain carrying 58kg at $13. Expect a bright start to the campaign.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Resuming. Finished off last campaign eighth of 13 at Chantilly All Weather November 8 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Alma Mater carrying 58kg at $18. On debut fifth of 8 at Longchamp October 19 over 1800m, 6 len behind Maintain carrying 58kg at $13. Expect a bright start to the campaign.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 38-day let-up. First-up after five months led but faded 2nd of 13 at Le Mans on March 4 over 1950m, 4 len behind Alpenveilchen with 55.5kg at $6.80. Previously second-up 7th of 11 at Chantilly on September 25 over 1600m, slow going 7 len behind Ahalya carrying 56.5kg at $25. Fitter and is a leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4.5). Second-up. Comes off a 38-day let-up. First-up after five months led but faded 2nd of 13 at Le Mans on March 4 over 1950m, 4 len behind Alpenveilchen with 55.5kg at $6.80. Previously second-up 7th of 11 at Chantilly on September 25 over 1600m, slow going 7 len behind Ahalya carrying 56.5kg at $25. Fitter and is a leading contender.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign sixth of 11 at Deauville All Weather November 25 over 1900m, 9 len behind Proxima Du Centaur with 58kg at $8.20. On debut second last of 8 at Longchamp October 19 over 1800m, 8 len behind Maintain with 58kg at $9.50. One of the leading chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Resuming. Finished off last campaign sixth of 11 at Deauville All Weather November 25 over 1900m, 9 len behind Proxima Du Centaur with 58kg at $8.20. On debut second last of 8 at Longchamp October 19 over 1800m, 8 len behind Maintain with 58kg at $9.50. One of the leading chances.

form.formComment: At debut, second last of 9 at Strasbourg on March 22 over 2000m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Melting Moon carrying 54.5kg at $12. Needs significant improvement to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). At debut, second last of 9 at Strasbourg on March 22 over 2000m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Melting Moon carrying 54.5kg at $12. Needs significant improvement to feature.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At very long odds at debut, got back early 7th of 14 at this track on February 28 over 2200m, slow going 11 len behind Sheeran with 54.5kg at $64. Last start got back early 6th of 10 at Le Mans on March 20 over 1950m, slow going 7 len behind Ivra Chope carrying 54.5kg at $8.50. Needs more time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Had two starts to date. At very long odds at debut, got back early 7th of 14 at this track on February 28 over 2200m, slow going 11 len behind Sheeran with 54.5kg at $64. Last start got back early 6th of 10 at Le Mans on March 20 over 1950m, slow going 7 len behind Ivra Chope carrying 54.5kg at $8.50. Needs more time.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, 3rd of 11 at Chantilly All Weather on January 21 over 1900m, 5 len behind Hatanka Fal with 56kg at $12. Second-up raced on the pace when 3rd of 13 at Le Mans on March 4 over 1950m, 6 len behind Alpenveilchen with 58kg at $8.40. Rates highly.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4.5). Third race start today. At debut, 3rd of 11 at Chantilly All Weather on January 21 over 1900m, 5 len behind Hatanka Fal with 56kg at $12. Second-up raced on the pace when 3rd of 13 at Le Mans on March 4 over 1950m, 6 len behind Alpenveilchen with 58kg at $8.40. Rates highly.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last campaign 13th of 15 at Chantilly All Weather December 9 over 1900m, 13 len behind Anashkaya with 58kg at $10. On debut second of 10 at this track November 22 over 1800m, soft track; 0.8 len behind La Zarra with 58kg at $6.20. Could feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last campaign 13th of 15 at Chantilly All Weather December 9 over 1900m, 13 len behind Anashkaya with 58kg at $10. On debut second of 10 at this track November 22 over 1800m, soft track; 0.8 len behind La Zarra with 58kg at $6.20. Could feature.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 7th of 13 at Chantilly All Weather on March 26 over 1900m, 5 len behind Egyptian Glory with 55.5kg at $56. Previously second-up ran last of 9 at Deauville All Weather on January 9 over 1900m, 10 len behind Anolante with 57.5kg at $2.90. Hard to get excited about her chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Second run back. First-up after three months 7th of 13 at Chantilly All Weather on March 26 over 1900m, 5 len behind Egyptian Glory with 55.5kg at $56. Previously second-up ran last of 9 at Deauville All Weather on January 9 over 1900m, 10 len behind Anolante with 57.5kg at $2.90. Hard to get excited about her chances.

form.formComment: At debut, led to the turn then faded 6th of 11 at Saint-Cloud on March 19 over 2000m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Temapica carrying 58kg at $21. Can do better. Likely improver.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). At debut, led to the turn then faded 6th of 11 at Saint-Cloud on March 19 over 2000m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Temapica carrying 58kg at $21. Can do better. Likely improver.

form.formComment: At debut, 5th of 9 at Strasbourg on March 22 over 2000m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Melting Moon carrying 54.5kg at $10. Encouraging debut and open to improvement.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). At debut, 5th of 9 at Strasbourg on March 22 over 2000m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Melting Moon carrying 54.5kg at $10. Encouraging debut and open to improvement.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, 3rd of 9 at Chantilly All Weather on March 3 over 1900m, 4.5 len behind The Last Dance carrying 58kg at $2.20. Ready to break through with race experience under her belt.
